parameters.command: cd /Volumes/TITA_039/MAC_MINI_03/.openclaw/workspace && git add pasta-do-tita/memoria-especialistas/ && CHANGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only | wc -l | tr -d ' ') && if [ "$CHANGED" -gt "0" ]; then git commit -m "🧠 auto-sync: $CHANGED arquivos — $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" && git push tita-memory memoria-v2:main && echo "pushed $CHANGED files"; else echo "nothing to push"; fi

cd /Volumes/TITA_039/MAC_MINI_03/.openclaw/workspace && git fetch tita-memory && git checkout tita-memory/main -- pasta-do-tita/memoria-especialistas/ 2>/dev/null || true && echo 'pulled latest memory'
